arts.ttl: Spain predicted XI vs Serbia: Lamine Yamal out, Álex Baena in
arts.sum: Spain are set to host Serbia in Córdoba in what will be Nations League A action in the fourth matchday of the competition. Spain lead the way in their group…

arts.ttl: Spain boss hits back at critics after Lamine Yamal injury
arts.sum: Spain boss Luis de la Fuente has fired back after receiving criticism for overworking Barcelona's Lamine Yamal, defiantly insisting that the national team staff "are not kamikazes". Barcelona's Gavi, Pedri and Ansu Fati have all suffered long-term injuries in recent years after a heavy match schedule for their club and the Spain national team.

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid and Spain are reviving the art of long-range shooting
arts.sum: For an art form that is allegedly dying out, long-distance goals have played a big part in Spanish football recently, especially for Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Nathan Butler-Oyedeji, Kai Havertz, Nico Williams
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: How to watch Spain vs Serbia FOR FREE: TV channel and live stream for Nations League today
arts.sum: Spain top of Group A4 after unbeaten start to campaign

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola is spellbound by English football, wants an international job in the future and would NEVER coach Spain, writes JACK GAUGHAN… now imagine his England team
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: English football enchants Pep Guardiola in a way that has surprised him across eight years on these shores. The culture of it all, more than anything.

arts.ttl: Spain captain Morata assures Barcelona star is ‘the best player in the world’
arts.sum: Spanish national team captain Álvaro Morata has on Monday made clear his feelings that Barcelona star and international teammate Lamine Yamal is already the standout player in all of world…

arts.ttl: Spain boss De la Fuente speaks out on Lamine Yamal’s squad departure
arts.sum: Spanish national team head coach Luis de la Fuente has provided an insight into the reasoning behind the premature departure of Lamine Yamal from his squad. Wide-man Lamine, of course,…

arts.ttl: O’Gorman on the podium in JuniorGP action in Spain
arts.sum: With only three laps remaining, Quiles made his move into second place with and tried to make a break from O’Gorman and Pini but the Italian Pini was back in front by the end of the long back straight. Final lap and barring a mistake, Carpe had the win in the bag but the drama was unfolding behind him as O’Gorman decided to make his move and tried to dive up the inside of Qulies and Pini into the first turn.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal equalled a surprise international record in Spain’s win over Denmark
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal secured for himself a head-turning piece of personal history, in his latest outing on the international stage. Wide-man Lamine was for his part back in action…
